socketedItems.secDescrText: A circle of ice expands from the caster. If the caster targets near their Frostbolt projectiles, it will expand from a number of those projectiles instead. If this skill would repeat when cast this way, it will instead expand again from the same projectiles after a short delay.
explicitMods: Deals 590 to 885 Cold Damage
Base radius is 2.5 metres
Deals 50% more Damage with Hits and Ailments when cast on Frostbolt
Can expand from up to 2 Frostbolt Projectiles

Supported Skills have 15% less Area of Effect per Intensity

flavourText: The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.

flavourText: "I staggered on, dying of thirst... I thought I found respite,
but no... it was a pit of newborns... dry and hollow...
and they screamed still, begging me for vengeance..."

will force it to take on the form it held before it entered our dimension."

Tawhoa weaved a net to catch the fish,
Tukohama built a fire to cook the fish,
and Kitava swallowed the entire lake, fish and all, with a single gulp.
